name: Akina Downhill
description: The legendary mountain pass. Hairpins, blind corners, steep drops. This is where legends are made.

name: Usui Pass
description: Narrow roads carved into the mountainside. One mistake and you're off the cliff.

name: Myogi Night Run
description: Racing by moonlight on unlit mountain roads. The fog rolls in thick.

name: Irohazaka Descent
description: 48 hairpin bends in a row. Each one tighter than the last. A true test of commitment.

name: Tsukuba Circuit
description: The ultimate test. Full circuit with technical chicanes and high-speed sweepers.

name: Hakone Mountain
description: A brutal all-weather pass. Snow, rain, fog — nature throws everything at you.
